q: What was Tesla's share of the US EV market in Q1 2024?
What was the EV share of total new-vehicle sales in the US in Q1 2024?
How many new electric vehicles did Americans buy in Q1 2024?
What was the average transaction price of a new EV in the US in Q1 2024?
What happened to Chevy Bolt sales in Q1 2024 and why?
ref: Fell 64.3% to 7,040 units because production was halted; a new version is expected in 2025

q: What EV tax credit does the Inflation Reduction Act offer?
What was the electric share of new-vehicle sales in the US in 2020?
What full-year 2024 EV market share does Cox Automotive forecast?
Which automakers grew EV sales more than 50% year over year in Q1 2024, and how did Tesla's sales change in the same period?
ref: BMW, Cadillac, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Lexus, Mercedes, Rivian and Vinfast grew >50%; Tesla fell about 13.3%

q: How did Tesla's average transaction price compare with the overall new-EV average in Q1 2024?
ref: Tesla's was $52,315, lower than the overall average of $55,167

q: How is the $7,500 IRA credit related to EV leasing trends?
ref: Leasing lets buyers qualify for the full $7,500, so leasing more than doubled to about 27%

q: Which luxury automakers grew EV sales in Q1 2024 and by how much?
How did states with ZEV regulations differ from states without them in EV market share?
ref: ZEV states had ~5% EV share vs ~1.3% in non-ZEV states

q: How did Tesla's US EV market share trend from Q1 2023 to Q1 2024?
How did Ford's EV sales perform versus Tesla in Q1 2024?
ref: Ford rose 86.1% YoY (second-highest EV volume), while Tesla fell about 13.3%

q: Which model drove Cadillac's EV growth and how large was it?
ref: The Lyriq; Cadillac grew 499.2% year over year

q: Who is the market leader in US EVs and what is the trend in its share?
ref: Tesla leads but its share is declining (51.3%, down from 61.7%)

q: What factors does Cox Automotive cite as driving EV sales higher in 2024 (the 'Year of More')?
ref: More new products, more incentives, more inventory, more leasing and more charging infrastructure

q: What share of EVs were leased in Q1 2024 compared with a year earlier?
ref: About 27%, more than double the prior year

q: Compare the sales trends of luxury EVs versus the affordable Chevy Bolt in Q1 2024.
ref: Luxury surged (Cadillac +499.2%, Mercedes +66.9%, BMW +62.6%) while the Chevy Bolt fell 64.3% due to halted production
